summary: Incomplete deliverable. Workflow references fixture files (junit-node18.xml, junit-node20.xml, results-api.json) in verification step that are not provided. Missing: fixture generation, bun test execution, act-result.txt artifact. Regex-based XML parsing (parsers.ts) is fragile—lacks support for CDATA, comments, entity encoding, hyphenated attributes. Silent error continuation in main.ts (continue on parse failures) masks issues. TypeScript types well-structured; modular design good, but untestable without fixtures and test harness referenced in markdown.ts comments.
